name: fastlink
description: FastLink — page snapshots, clicks, console/network capture, and batch automation via a paired Chrome extension

tools.name: fast_status
tools.description: Report whether the Chrome extension is connected

tools.name: fast_snapshot
tools.description: Get a fast snapshot of clickable elements on the active Chrome tab

tools.name: fast_text
tools.description: Read innerText/outerHTML from the active tab (CSP-safe, works on claude.ai)

tools.name: fast_screenshot
tools.description: Capture active tab as PNG, returns file path

tools.name: fast_click
tools.description: Click an element by text/label/aria-label

tools.name: fast_fill
tools.description: Fill input/textarea/contenteditable by label/placeholder/name

tools.name: fast_select_option
tools.description: Pick an option from a dropdown/combobox (handles react-select, native select, ARIA)

tools.name: fast_key_press
tools.description: Press a single key (Enter, Escape, Tab, etc.)

tools.name: fast_scroll
tools.description: Scroll the active tab — auto-detects nested scrollers like the claude.ai chat

tools.name: fast_tab
tools.description: Open a URL in a new Chrome tab

tools.name: fast_nav
tools.description: Navigate the active tab to a URL

tools.name: fast_list
tools.description: List all open tabs in the current window

tools.name: fast_switch
tools.description: Switch focus to a tab by id or URL/title substring

tools.name: fast_close
tools.description: Close a Chrome tab by id or URL/title match

tools.name: fast_wait
tools.description: Wait until an element with the given text appears

tools.name: fast_evaluate
tools.description: Run arbitrary JS in the active tab (blocked on CSP-locked pages — use fast_text instead)

tools.name: fast_batch
tools.description: Run multiple FastLink actions in sequence with one tool call

tools.name: fast_console
tools.description: Read recent console messages (log/warn/error) from the active tab

tools.name: fast_network
tools.description: List recent network requests from the active tab

tools.name: fast_hover
tools.description: Hover over an element to trigger tooltips/hover menus

tools.name: fast_drag
tools.description: Drag an element to another element or to coordinates

tools.name: fast_fill_form
tools.description: Fill multiple form fields in one call (declarative {label: value} map)

tools.name: fast_network_replay
tools.description: Re-fire a captured request from the page's origin (auto-includes cookies/auth)

tools.name: fast_macro_save
tools.description: Save a named multi-step recipe for replay later

tools.name: fast_macro_list
tools.description: List all saved macros

tools.name: fast_macro_run
tools.description: Run a saved macro by name

tools.name: fast_macro_delete
tools.description: Delete a saved macro
